channel.title: Tales of the True Hand
channel.description: Weekly recaps of the Crew of the True Hand — a D&D 5e campaign following Storm King's Thunder — told by Vandal Lovelace, bard and hearth-storyteller.
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly recaps of the Crew of the True Hand — a D&D 5e campaign following Storm King's Thunder — told by Vandal Lovelace, bard and hearth-storyteller.
channel.itunes:author: Vandal Lovelace

item.title: 2026-06-16 — The Crew comes to Waterdeep
item.description: Making landfall in Waterdeep, the Crew found themselves front-page news, chased leads on Harshnag and the Oracle through a dragon-mad wizard and a bard by his statue, then broke up a mind-controlled bar brawl at the docks.
item.itunes:summary: Making landfall in Waterdeep, the Crew found themselves front-page news, chased leads on Harshnag and the Oracle through a dragon-mad wizard and a bard by his statue, then broke up a mind-controlled bar brawl at the docks.

item.title: 2026-06-02 — The Hunger of Queen Guh
item.description: Golden Fields takes its second raid since the crew arrived, and an insight check reveals what the hill giants are actually after.
item.itunes:summary: Golden Fields takes its second raid since the crew arrived, and an insight check reveals what the hill giants are actually after.

item.title: 2026-05-12 — The Harvest Thieves
item.description: A goblin-bugbear-ogre raid swept through Golden Fields at night, and the crew fought through two waves before the abbey bell rang to warn that giants were coming.
item.itunes:summary: A goblin-bugbear-ogre raid swept through Golden Fields at night, and the crew fought through two waves before the abbey bell rang to warn that giants were coming.

item.title: 2026-03-08 — The Tree That Named a Giant
item.description: Zephyros set the crew down at Golden Fields, where a yeti barkeep, an awakened tree, and a Waterdhavian noble pointed them toward dragons, the Spine of the World, and a giant named Harshnag.
item.itunes:summary: Zephyros set the crew down at Golden Fields, where a yeti barkeep, an awakened tree, and a Waterdhavian noble pointed them toward dragons, the Spine of the World, and a giant named Harshnag.

item.title: 2026-02-10 — Blood of the Giant
item.description: Roused by Zephyros's dire warning of giant gods and an imminent assault, the crew set the wizard's tower down outside Goldenfields and weathered a brutal battle against a young blue dragon, a half-dragon rider, a kobold lackey, and three gargoyles — emerging bloodied but with a quest to the Eye of Annam and a haul of strange loot.
item.itunes:summary: Roused by Zephyros's dire warning of giant gods and an imminent assault, the crew set the wizard's tower down outside Goldenfields and weathered a brutal battle against a young blue dragon, a half-dragon rider, a kobold lackey, and three gargoyles — emerging bloodied but with a quest to the Eye of Annam and a haul of strange loot.

item.title: 2026-01-27 — Stone Wings on an Ill Wind
item.description: Aboard Zephyros's flying tower bound for Goldenfields, the crew rifled through giant-sized bookshelves, won gifts of map, chalk, book, and bronze griffin, then fought off a gargoyle ambush riding in on an unnatural storm.
item.itunes:summary: Aboard Zephyros's flying tower bound for Goldenfields, the crew rifled through giant-sized bookshelves, won gifts of map, chalk, book, and bronze griffin, then fought off a gargoyle ambush riding in on an unnatural storm.

item.title: 2026-01-13 — Destiny Comes to Nightstone
item.description: The crew finally toppled Corvin's takeover of Nightstone — only for Aganor's vengeance to summon Destiny, a cambion of Asmodeus, forcing a fighting retreat before a cloud giant named Zephyros descended to recruit them to restore the Ordning.
item.itunes:summary: The crew finally toppled Corvin's takeover of Nightstone — only for Aganor's vengeance to summon Destiny, a cambion of Asmodeus, forcing a fighting retreat before a cloud giant named Zephyros descended to recruit them to restore the Ordning.

item.title: 2025-12-17 — Black Banners over Nightstone
item.description: Back at Nightstone with black banners flying, the crew met the new claimant Corvin, learned the wider giant troubles, and split — Toz and Fiz brokered an oath with a tiefling cultist while Hal and Woz pulled a cursed sword from a sarcophagus in the crypt.
item.itunes:summary: Back at Nightstone with black banners flying, the crew met the new claimant Corvin, learned the wider giant troubles, and split — Toz and Fiz brokered an oath with a tiefling cultist while Hal and Woz pulled a cursed sword from a sarcophagus in the crypt.

item.title: 2025-12-07 — The Name in the Bottle
item.description: A tense truce with the goblin boss got the children out alive, the crew wisely refused to trade blows with a black ooze roosting in a stalactite, and Molak gave up the genie bottle along with a name in Triboar — Derothra Shendrel — who's said to know the wish-word.
item.itunes:summary: A tense truce with the goblin boss got the children out alive, the crew wisely refused to trade blows with a black ooze roosting in a stalactite, and Molak gave up the genie bottle along with a name in Triboar — Derothra Shendrel — who's said to know the wish-word.

item.title: 2025-11-12 — The Stone the Giants Stole
item.description: Nightstone's fall came clear — cloud giants dropped rocks from the sky and stole the black stone — and the crew followed the trail into Ardeep to a goblin cave, where they met a druid of the Emerald Enclave and dropped a pair of ogres to free the villagers.
item.itunes:summary: Nightstone's fall came clear — cloud giants dropped rocks from the sky and stole the black stone — and the crew followed the trail into Ardeep to a goblin cave, where they met a druid of the Emerald Enclave and dropped a pair of ogres to free the villagers.

item.title: 2025-09-23 — The Bell That Would Not Stop
item.description: The wrecked crew of the* True Hand *stagger inland to Nightstone, find it overrun by goblins and dire wolves, and end up defending the ruined village alongside a party of adventurers hunting a missing woman named Kella.
item.itunes:summary: The wrecked crew of the* True Hand *stagger inland to Nightstone, find it overrun by goblins and dire wolves, and end up defending the ruined village alongside a party of adventurers hunting a missing woman named Kella.
